target.name: Dusk
target.query: SELECT last("state") AS "dusk" FROM "sensor.sun_next_dusk" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d)
SELECT last("state") AS "dawn" FROM "sensor.sun_next_dawn" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d)
SELECT distinct("hvac_action_str") FROM "climate.main_floor" WHERE ("hvac_action_str"::field != 'idle') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($interval) fill(0)

targets.query: SELECT last("value"), "friendly_name_str" FROM /sensor.*motion/ WHERE value = 1 AND $timeFilter
SELECT mean("value") *1 FROM "input_boolean.alarm_away_arm" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($interval) fill(previous)

SELECT 
  (mean("value") * 1) AS "away",
  (mean("value") * 2) AS "night",
  (mean("value") * 3) AS "home"
FROM "input_boolean.alarm_away_arm", "input_boolean.alarm_night_arm", "input_boolean.alarm_home_arm"
WHERE $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)

SELECT 
  (mean("value") * 1) AS "away",
  (mean("value") * 2) AS "night",
  (mean("value") * 3) AS "home"
FROM "input_boolean.alarm_away_arm", "input_boolean.alarm_night_arm", "input_boolean.alarm_home_arm"
WHERE $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)

SELECT 
  (mean("value") * 1) AS "away",
  (mean("value") * 2) AS "night",
  (mean("value") * 3) AS "home"
FROM "input_boolean.alarm_away_arm", "input_boolean.alarm_night_arm", "input_boolean.alarm_home_arm"
WHERE $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT mean("value") FROM /sensor.*_motion/ WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("value") FROM /sensor.*_temperature/ WHERE ("entity_id"::tag != 'mississauga_ontario_canada_temperature') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT mean("value") FROM /sensor.*_temperature/ WHERE ("entity_id"::tag != 'mississauga_ontario_canada_temperature') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
SELECT mean("value") FROM /sensor.*_light_level/ WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(previous)
